subcodes.first_line: O Beauty! Thou hast indeed attained unto My remembrance and the traces of My Pen, time and time again. Render thanks unto God for this great bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جمال قد فزت بذکری و اثار قلمی مرة بعد مرة اشکر الله بهذا الفضل العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @praise and encouragement
